[[File:Chaeldar chathead.png|left]]
'''Chaeldar''' is a mid-level [[Slayer master]]. She is found in the throne room of [[Zanaris]], directly south of the entrance from the [[Lumbridge Swamp]], meaning completion of the [[Lost City]] [[quest]] is required to reach her. She gives out mid to high level [[Slayer]] [[Slayer task|tasks]], which may only be attempted by players with a [[combat level]] of at least 70.

Getting a Slayer task from Chaeldar is a task in the [[Lumbridge & Draynor Medium Diary]].

Blocking a task with Chaeldar costs 70 [[Slayer reward point|Slayer reward points]].

==Slayer points==
Players can receive [[Slayer reward point]]s for completing [[Slayer task]]s—this is based on how many tasks players have accomplished in a row. Completion of a task assigned by Chaeldar will grant you:

{|class=wikitable style="text-align:center;"
!Task interval
!Points given
|-
|Every Task
|10
|-
|Every 10th
|50
|-
|Every 50th
|150
|-
|Every 100th
|250
|-
|Every 250th
|350
|-
|Every 1,000th
|500
|}
Chaeldar's blocks cost 70 Slayer points.

==Fairy rings==
The [[Fairy ring]] network is a useful method of doing Chaeldar's [[Slayer task]]s. It has teleport spots close to the [[Slayer Tower]] ({{Fairycode|CKS}}), the [[Fremennik Slayer Dungeon]] ({{Fairycode|AJR}}), and [[Fairy ring|other locations]] to be reached easily for no cost to the player, all of which contain the [[Slayer monster]]s that she assigns and can be easily reached from the fairy ring in [[Zanaris]].

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 26 March 2025
|update = Poll 83 QoL Changes
|poll = Poll 83 - Castle Wars, New Player Changes & More
|change = Chaeldar will now assign [[Slayer task/Crabs|crabs]] tasks.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 8 May 2024
|update = Project Rebalance: Skilling & Poll 81 MTA Changes
|change = *Chaeldar no longer assigns the following tasks:
**Banshees
**Bronze dragons
**Cave crawlers
**Cave slimes
**Cockatrice
**Harpie Bug Swarms
**Infernal Mages
**Iron dragons
**Lizards
**Mogres
**Molanisks
**Pyrefiends
**Rockslugs
**Steel dragons
**Wall beasts
*Various minimum and maximum quantities of Slayer tasks have been reduced.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 24 March 2016
|update = White & Black Graceful
|poll = Old School Content Poll 40: Vanilla LootShare & QoL
|change = It is now possible to unlock the possibility of receiving a Lizardmen slayer task from Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar. Unlocking this task costs 75 slayer points.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 18 February 2016
|update = Dragon Claws & 3rd Birthday
|poll = Quality of Life - Top 10 PvM Suggestions
|change = Slayer masters now give information about your current task if you prematurely request a new one.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 24 September 2015
|update = New Animations & Barbarian Assault Changes
|poll = Old School Content Poll 36: Skilling Pets
|change = Spiritual rangers, mages and warrior are now grouped into a single slayer task of spiritual creatures.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 10 September 2015
|update = Slayer Assignment Rework
|change = Chaeldar will now assign between 110 and 170 spirit creatures and aviansie.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 29 January 2015
|update = Ignore lists, 1v1s & More
|poll = Old School Content Poll 29: Grand Exchange
|change = Slayer masters now have a right-click option, Assignment, which allows players to quickly check a task's progress or start a new one.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}
